tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All results are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (5.8%), indicating prediabetes. Glucose is normal, and kidney, electrolyte, and lipid profiles are unremarkable. Recommend lifestyle modification and follow-up for glycemic control. No acute laboratory concerns.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
